subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! In all matters take recourse unto the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting, and place thy trust in the All-Loving Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال قدم در جمیع امور متوسل بحی قیوم شو و متوکل بر رب ودود قلب انسان
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @effort; striving, @law of cause and effect, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
